attributes.snippet: [{"speaker_id": "1", "content": "Good morning, so our Scripture reading is in the Worship Guide."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "If you flip it around, it's actually a few passages so that you don't have to flip between my reading."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "They're all together."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "And we're looking at when Paul was traveling to ephesus."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "He had Priscilla and Aquila, you may remember those rhyming names, with him."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "And so we're going to start in Acts 18 verses 19 through 21."}]

[{"speaker_id": "1", "content": "If you've got a Bible with you, do please turn with me to Ephesians chapter one, or it's also there in your worship guide if you need that, there on the back, Ephesians chapter one."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "Last week, we looked at this same passage that we're looking at this morning, and we focused on the spiritual blessings that are ours in Christ."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "We looked at adoption, election, redemption, our inheritance."}]

[{"speaker_id": "1", "content": "Our scripture reading will be out of Ephesians 2, 1 through 10."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "And you were dead in the trespasses and sins in which you once walked, following the course of this world, following the prince of the power of the air, the spirit that is now at work in the sons of disobedience, among whom we all once lived in the passions of our flesh, carrying out the desires of the body and the mind."}]
[{"speaker_id": "1", "content": "Our scripture reading this morning is Ephesians chapter 2."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "Ephesians chapter 2, we'll be reading verses 11 to 22."}]

[{"speaker_id": "1", "content": "So if you take your Bibles and turn with me to Ephesians chapter 3, please, Ephesians chapter 3."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "We've been walking through the book of Ephesians together verse by verse, and now we've come to this chapter."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "Just as you're turning there, this past week, I started thinking about old commercials."}]

[{"speaker_id": "1", "content": "Please turn to Isaiah 52, and we're going to read verse 13, down to chapter 53 and verse 5."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "So the reading there in your worship guide will stop just shy of where we're going to read up to."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "So if you've got a Bible, do have it open to Isaiah 52."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "It says, Behold, my servant shall act wisely."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "He shall be high and lifted up and shall be exalted."}]

[{"speaker_id": "1", "content": "I therefore, a prisoner for the Lord, urge you to walk in a manner worthy of the calling to which you have been called, with all humility and gentleness, with patience, bearing with one another in love, eager to maintain the unity of the Spirit and the bond of peace."}]

[{"speaker_id": "1", "content": "Last week, we were in Ephesians 4, and we saw there that life is designed to be lived together in community."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "That's the kind of life that is offered to us in Jesus, and that is experienced in the life of the church as we learn to follow him together."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "So, you're right, church isn't an event, it's a family, and we need each other."}]

[{"speaker_id": "1", "content": "All right, our scripture today is Ephesians 5."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "The worship guide says, verse 13, we're gonna start in verse 1."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "Therefore, be imitators of God as beloved children, and walk in love as Christ loved us, and gave himself up for us, a fragrant offering and sacrifice to God."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "But sexual immorality and all impurity or covetousness must not be named among you, as is proper among saints."}]

[{"speaker_id": "1", "content": "And I want to invite all of us to please turn together to the Book of Ephesians."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "So if you've not been here before, we've been going through the Book of Ephesians in the New Testament."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "And in the Book of Ephesians, we see what it means to be in Christ and to find our identity together in Him."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "And over the past couple of weeks, we've seen that in Christ, we can have a new life."}]

[{"speaker_id": "1", "content": "Wives, submit to your own husbands as to the Lord, for the husband is the head of the wife, even as Christ is the head of the church, his body and is himself its savior."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "Now, as the church submits to Christ, so also wives should submit in everything to their husbands."}]

[{"speaker_id": "1", "content": "If you got a Bible, please turn with me to Ephesians chapter 6 as we continue on in our series in Ephesians."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "Ephesians chapter 6."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "Well, I thought I dodged a bullet getting Matt Toodle to preach on marriage, but now I get to preach on parenting and slavery."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "So, I got to the point that this week, late in the week, where I just realized that was probably too much."}]

[{"speaker_id": "1", "content": "Bond servants, obey your earthly masters with fear and trembling, with a sincere heart, as you would Christ."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "Not by the way of eye service, as people pleasers, but as bond servants of Christ, doing the will of God from the heart, rendering service with a good will as to the Lord and not to man."}]

[{"speaker_id": "1", "content": "Our reading today will be from the letter of Paul to the Ephesians, chapter 1, verse 3 through 14."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "Blessed be the God and Father of our Lord Jesus Christ, who has blessed us in Christ with every spiritual blessing in the heavenly places."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "Even as he chose us in him before the foundation of the world, that we should be holy and blameless before him in love."}]

[{"speaker_id": "1", "content": "There's nothing like getting up to preach and like half of the people just turning around and leaving every single week."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "We've come to the end of our series on the book of Ephesians."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "This is our very first series together at Trinity Fellowship."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "As we've begun, it's been wonderful to walk through this together."}]

[{"speaker_id": "1", "content": "The passage this morning is going to be read from Ephesians chapter 2, verses 1 through 10."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "That's Ephesians chapter 2, verses 1 through 10."}]

[{"speaker_id": "1", "content": "Do please take your Bibles and turn with me to John chapter 8."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "We're going to be reading a few verses from there, and a bit later on we'll look at John chapter 20."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "It's also in your worship guides if you want to look there."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "Just as you're turning, let me just say over the next few weeks, as we're leading up to Easter, like many other churches, we will be focusing our attention on Jesus."}]

[{"speaker_id": "1", "content": "So do take your Bibles and turn with me to Ephesians chapter 2."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "We're going to be continuing in our series in the book of Ephesians, and we don't always do this, but could you stand with me as we read God's word together?"}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "Ephesians chapter 2, it's also there on your worship guides."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "And so when you find it, just join us in standing, and we'll read this passage together."}]

attributes.itunesTitle: I Am the Light of the World
attributes.name: I Am the Light of the World

attributes.snippet: [{"speaker_id": "1", "content": "Well, let's open our Bibles then to the Gospel of John, the Gospel of John."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "We are making our way through the I am statements of Jesus in the Gospel of John."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "Now, the I am statements of Jesus, as we said a couple of weeks ago, are these statements that come from Jesus that are throughout the Gospel of John, where he takes the foremost name of God in the Old Testament, I am who I am."}]

[{"speaker_id": "1", "content": "That was wonderful."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "Thank you so much, Tom and Jenny Mundy, for that."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "And it's wonderful to see all the children we have here and to hear what they were sharing about Jesus, who is both King and Savior."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "Well, let's pray to him together as we come to his words."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "Let's pray."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "Lord, we thank you that you are the Savior of the world."}]

attributes.itunesTitle: I Am the Resurrection and the Life
attributes.name: I Am the Resurrection and the Life

attributes.snippet: [{"speaker_id": "1", "content": "And if you've got a Bible, I would invite you to turn with me to John 11."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "So John 11, it's also found there in your worship guides."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "But as you're turning there, maybe go in your mind's eye to the airport."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "I'm sure there's places you'd rather be than the airport today."}]

attributes.name: I Am the Way, the Truth, and the Life

attributes.snippet: [{"speaker_id": "1", "content": "Bible reading this morning is taken from John's Gospel, Chapter 14, verses 1 to 7."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "Let not your hearts be troubled."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "Believe in God, believe also in me."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "In my father's house are many rooms."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "If it were not so, would I have told you that I go to prepare a place for you?"}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "And if I go and prepare a place for you, I will come again and will take you to myself, that where I am, you may be also."}]

description.standard:
Scripture Passage: Matthew 28:16-20
 1. Jesus Has All Authority
In verse 18, Jesus says, “All authority in heaven and on earth has been given to me.” Everything we do flows from this truth. Jesus is the King with authority over everything — life, death, and even the hearts of people. That should give us confidence as we go about His mission.
 2. Jesus Calls Us to Follow Him
Before we talk about making disciples, we need to recognize that we are first called to be disciples. Following Jesus means receiving a new identity — we belong to Him. Our lives no longer belong to us; they are His. This is symbolized in baptism, where we are named in the triune name of the Father, Son, and Holy Spirit.
 3. Jesus Sends Us to Make Disciples
The central command in this passage is to “make disciples of all nations.” We are not here just for ourselves — we are here to go out and make Christ known, both locally and globally. This means we need to be intentional about reaching people who don’t yet know Jesus, not just moving Christians from one church to another.
 4. Jesus Is Always With Us
Finally, Jesus promises, “I am with you always, to the end of the age.” As we step out in obedience to His call, we don’t do so in our own strength. We are accompanied by the One who holds all authority and who has promised never to leave us.

attributes.fullDescription:
Scripture Passage: Matthew 28:16-20

1. Jesus Has All Authority

In verse 18, Jesus says, “All authority in heaven and on earth has been given to me.” Everything we do flows from this truth. Jesus is the King with authority over everything — life, death, and even the hearts of people. That should give us confidence as we go about His mission.

 2. Jesus Calls Us to Follow Him

Before we talk about making disciples, we need to recognize that we are first called to be disciples. Following Jesus means receiving a new identity — we belong to Him. Our lives no longer belong to us; they are His. This is symbolized in baptism, where we are named in the triune name of the Father, Son, and Holy Spirit.

 3. Jesus Sends Us to Make Disciples

The central command in this passage is to “make disciples of all nations.” We are not here just for ourselves — we are here to go out and make Christ known, both locally and globally. This means we need to be intentional about reaching people who don’t yet know Jesus, not just moving Christians from one church to another.

 4. Jesus Is Always With Us

Finally, Jesus promises, “I am with you always, to the end of the age.” As we step out in obedience to His call, we don’t do so in our own strength. We are accompanied by the One who holds all authority and who has promised never to leave us.
attributes.name: Why We're Here

attributes.snippet: [{"speaker_id": "1", "content": "Our scripture passage this morning comes from Matthew 28, verse 16."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "Now the eleven disciples went to Galilee, to the mountain to which Jesus had directed them."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "And when they saw him, they worshiped him, but some doubted."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "And Jesus came and said to them, All authority in heaven and on earth has been given to me."}]

[{"speaker_id": "1", "content": "All right, do take your Bibles and turn with me to John chapter 15."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "John chapter 15."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "We've come now to the final I am statement from Jesus in the Gospel of John."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "So throughout we've been seeing that Jesus says that he is the I am."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "He is the perfect revelation of God, the God who is self-existent and eternally existent."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "Jesus says, that is who I am."}]

[{"speaker_id": "1", "content": "All right, well, if you've got a Bible, do please take it and turn with me to Deuteronomy chapter six, Deuteronomy chapter six."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "For those of you who have the luxury of having a worship guide, it is also there as well."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "So Deuteronomy chapter six."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "If you want to get a good debate going, pick a category and say, who is the greatest?"}]

[{"speaker_id": "1", "content": "All right, good morning."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "We are going to be in Psalm 2, so should be right next to where we were last week, if you're still marked there, Psalm 1."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "You can turn there in your Bible if you have one, or it's also in the Worship Guide."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "We're going to start with reading this, and then we'll pray and get into it."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "All right."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "Why do the nations rage and the people's plot in vain?"}]

[{"speaker_id": "1", "content": "Oh Lord, how many are my foes."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "Many are rising against me."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "Many are saying of my soul, there is no salvation for him in God."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "But you, oh Lord, are a shield about me, my glory and the lifter of my head."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "I cried aloud to the Lord, and he answered me from his holy hill."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "I lay down and slept."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "I woke again, for the Lord sustained me."}]

[{"speaker_id": "1", "content": "Please turn with me to Psalm 1, Psalm 1."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "We're starting a new series this morning in the Book of Psalms."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "And Psalms is a book made up of 150 Hebrew poems, and these were written not only to be read, but also to be prayed and even to be sung."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "And for thousands of years, they have been a faithful guide to God's people, leading them in prayer and in praise, and I hope they will be the same for us."}]

[{"speaker_id": "1", "content": "Let's invite you to turn with me to Psalm 4 this morning, Psalm 4."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "It's also there in your worship guide."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "It says Psalm 3 in your worship guide, where the actual text is."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "And so let this be an advertisement."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "Chris and I were talking."}]

[{"speaker_id": "1", "content": "Give ear to my words, O Lord, consider my groaning."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "Give attention to the sound of my cry, my King and my God, for to you do I pray."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "O Lord, in the morning you hear my voice."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "In the morning I prepare a sacrifice for you and watch."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "For you are not a God who delights in wickedness."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "Evil may not dwell with you."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "The boastful shall not stand before your eyes."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "You hate all evildoers."}]

[{"speaker_id": "1", "content": "Good morning, it's good to see everybody."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "I strategically picked the 4th of July weekend, so nobody would be here, but you guys showed up, so thank you."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "I want to say, first of all, that I am a teacher, not a preacher."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "So a couple consequences that means for us."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "First of all, if I get into the teacher mode and ask a question, it's not a rhetorical question, you can answer."}]

[{"speaker_id": "1", "content": "I'll begin reading in verse 1, and we'll read to the end of the psalm."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "O Lord, my God, in you do I take refuge."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "Save me from all my pursuers, and deliver me."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "Lest like a lion they tear my soul apart, rending it in pieces with none to deliver."}]

[{"speaker_id": "1", "content": "I will give thanks to the Lord with my whole heart."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "I will recount all of your wonderful deeds."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "I will be glad in exulting you."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "I will sing praise to your name, O Most High."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "When my enemies turn back, they stumble and perish before your presence."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "For you have maintained my just cause."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "You have sat on the throne giving righteous judgment."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "You have rebuked the nations."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "You have made the wicked perish."}]

[{"speaker_id": "1", "content": "Well, good morning."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "What a tremendous grace and gift it is to have such talented, gifted worship leaders that truly lead us in worship."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "So thank you, worship team."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "This morning, we're gonna be in Psalm 13, so if you would, open your Bibles and read with me."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "How long, O Lord, will you forget me forever?"}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "How long will you hide your face from me?"}]

attributes.itunesTitle: One Voice: Glorifying God through Our Worship
attributes.name: One Voice: Glorifying God through Our Worship

attributes.snippet: [{"speaker_id": "1", "content": "So we, the Book of Romans is a wonderful book."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "I'd love for us to go through this entire book."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "But we're not gonna be doing that at this time, maybe in the future."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "And Romans 15 is a wonderful chapter, and we're gonna spend three weeks in Romans 15, and we're still not gonna cover everything that is in this chapter."}]

[{"speaker_id": "1", "content": "Pray with me and for me really quick before I share my testimony."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "Heavenly Father, we, I'm so humbled to have the opportunity to share even just a part of my story."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "And I'm reminded that I am not really sharing my story, but I'm sharing your story through me."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "So Lord, let that be the story that is made known today."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "In Jesus' name, Amen."}]

[{"speaker_id": "1", "content": "Good morning."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "Pray with me before we dive into the text today."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "Heavenly Father, we are so thankful that we get to come and worship you."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "Pray Lord that today you would reveal to us more about who you are, your goodness, and your faithfulness to us."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "Pray all of this in your name, amen."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "All right."}]

[{"speaker_id": "1", "content": "Our reading today comes from the 14th Psalm."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "It's also in the handout."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "The fool says in his heart, there is no God."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "They are corrupt."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "They do abominable deeds."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "There is none who does good."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "The Lord looks down from heaven on the children of men to see if there are any who understand, who seek after God."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "They have all turned aside."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "Together, they have become corrupt."}]

attributes.itunesTitle: One Voice: Glorifying God through Our Welcome
attributes.name: One Voice: Glorifying God through Our Welcome

attributes.snippet: [{"speaker_id": "1", "content": "Well, last week, we began this kind of new mini-series."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "That's where we're kind of moving into this second year of Trinity Fellowship."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "In Romans 15, which we just called this, One Voice, glorifying God through our worship, welcome and witness."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "So, last week, we were looking at what it means to glorify God through our worship."}]

attributes.itunesTitle: One Voice: Glorifying God through Our Witness
attributes.name: One Voice: Glorifying God through Our Witness

attributes.snippet: [{"speaker_id": "1", "content": "If you've got a Bible with you, please turn with me to Romans chapter 15."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "It's also there in your worship guide, if you need that."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "In Romans chapter 15 verse six, we're told that the church has been brought together that we might glorify God with one voice."}]

[{"speaker_id": "1", "content": "We're so pleased to have, as I said, Bernard and Betsy here at church with us this morning."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "And I first met Bernard in England, and he was coming to Stoke-on-Trent."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "This is like 16, 17 years ago, something like that, where we were living."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "And there was like an evangelistic mission where you could bring folks who were non-Christians, who wanted to hear more about the Christian faith to come."}]

[{"speaker_id": "1", "content": "Well, if you've got a Bible, please turn with me to Matthew chapter 16."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "It's also there in your worship guides."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "Matthew chapter 16, we'll read verse 13 down to the end of the chapter."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "So verse 13 to verse 28."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "Now when Jesus came into the district of Caesarea Philippi, he asked the disciples, who do people say that the Son of Man is?"}]

attributes.itunesTitle: Firm Foundation: What We Believe About God
attributes.name: Firm Foundation: What We Believe About God

attributes.snippet: [{"speaker_id": "1", "content": "Well, if you've got a Bible, please turn to Acts chapter 17."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "Here in just a little bit, I'll have Ethan come in and read it."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "Just to share with you what we're doing at the moment."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "We're starting a new series here called Firm Foundation, What We Believe and Why It Matters."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "And last week, we looked at the fact that Jesus is building His church."}]

attributes.itunesTitle: Firm Foundation: What We Believe About Scripture
attributes.name: Firm Foundation: What We Believe About Scripture

attributes.snippet: [{"speaker_id": "1", "content": "We're working our way through a series called Firm Foundation, What We Believe and Why It Matters."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "And this is going through our Statement of Faith as we're getting started as a church."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "And each one of the doctrines that are covered in that statement of faith, they're really foundational doctrines."}]

attributes.itunesTitle: Firm Foundation: What We Believe about Humanity
attributes.name: Firm Foundation: What We Believe about Humanity

attributes.snippet: [{"speaker_id": "1", "content": "Well, this morning, we're continuing on in our Firm Foundations series, where we're looking at the truths that are outlined in our statement of faith."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "And this morning, we've come to our statement on humanity, which you can find at the back of your worship guide there at the bottom."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "It says, we believe that man was created in the image of God to glorify Him by enjoying Him forever."}]

attributes.itunesTitle: Firm Foundation: What We Believe about Sin
attributes.name: Firm Foundation: What We Believe about Sin

attributes.snippet: [{"speaker_id": "1", "content": "Well, speaking of rocks and foundations, we are continuing our series this morning, which we're calling Firm Foundation."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "A few weeks ago, we saw Jesus' promise to build His church, and He builds His church on a firm foundation."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "He is the cornerstone, but He's also given us the firm foundation of His Word."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "And there's some foundational truths in His Word, which we're going through."}]

attributes.itunesTitle: An Attentive God in Troubling Times
attributes.name: An Attentive God in Troubling Times

attributes.snippet: [{"speaker_id": "1", "content": "Good morning, welcome to Trinity Fellowship."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "Thank you, Brandon, for opening us, and James, and Dan, and Mary."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "Thank you all for leading us in worship this morning."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "Let's first, let's give you a second to turn to Psalm 10."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "Now read it for us."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "It's also, it's in the worship guide on, I think, page three."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "So if you need that."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "Why, O Lord, do you stand far away?"}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "Why do you hide yourself in times of trouble?"}]

attributes.itunesTitle: Firm Foundation: What We Believe about Jesus
attributes.name: Firm Foundation: What We Believe about Jesus

attributes.snippet: [{"speaker_id": "1", "content": "Dear God, thank you for this time together to consider your word to us."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "I pray that we'll have open minds and open hearts to hear your message to us."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "I pray that I will get out of the way so that your message will shine in our minds and hearts."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "In the name of the Father, the Son and the Holy Spirit, Amen."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "All right, this weekend, working around in the yard, I hurt my back."}]

attributes.itunesTitle: Firm Foundation: What We Believe about Salvation
attributes.name: Firm Foundation: What We Believe about Salvation

attributes.snippet: [{"speaker_id": "1", "content": "Once again, welcome."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "We're so glad that each one of you are here."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "It's wonderful to welcome Micah as well, there in the back."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "And he's the newest member of the church."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "Maybe he was just born if you didn't realize."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "And so we are going to continue in our series on our statement of faith."}]

attributes.itunesTitle: Firm Foundation: What We Believe about the Holy Spirit
attributes.name: Firm Foundation: What We Believe about the Holy Spirit

attributes.snippet: [{"speaker_id": "1", "content": "Well, this morning, we're continuing on in our Firm Foundations series."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "So if you've got a Bible, please turn with me to Acts chapter 2."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "This morning, we're looking at the doctrine of the Holy Spirit."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "So in this series, we're walking through our statement of faith, and we're looking at what we believe and why it matters."}]

attributes.itunesTitle: Firm Foundation: What We Believe about the Church Part I
attributes.name: Firm Foundation: What We Believe about the Church Part I

attributes.snippet: [{"speaker_id": "1", "content": "Well, on Sunday mornings, we've been going through a series looking at our statement of faith as we're getting started as a church."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "And we're walking through piece by piece looking at that, but most importantly, what scripture says about each one of these core doctrines of our faith."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "And so we're coming to the last couple."}]

attributes.itunesTitle: Firm Foundation: What We Believe about the Church Part II
attributes.name: Firm Foundation: What We Believe about the Church Part II

attributes.snippet: [{"speaker_id": "1", "content": "Well, we're continuing in our series, coming to the end of it, of Firm Foundation, where we're looking at our church statement of faith together."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "And last Sunday, we looked at our statement on the church."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "And this Sunday, we're continuing with that."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "So last Sunday, we really focused on who the church is, or what the church is."}]

[{"speaker_id": "1", "content": "Come in, thank you both."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "Well, if you've got a Bible, please turn with me to Matthew chapter 13."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "It's also on the back of the worship guide or inside the worship guide."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "Matthew chapter 13."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "We will begin reading in verse 10."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "We'll read down to verse 17, and then we'll skip a few verses, and we'll pick it up once again in verse 44, and read down to the end of verse 46."}]

[{"speaker_id": "1", "content": "If you've got a Bible, please turn with me to Exodus chapter one."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "Exodus chapter one."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "It's also in the worship guide if you need it."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "As you're turning there, I wonder if you read any good books this past year in 2025."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "If you're looking for a good recommendation, I read a novel called Theo of Golden."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "I don't know if anybody else read that out there, but it's a really, really good book by Alan Levi."}]

[{"speaker_id": "1", "content": "Let's pay careful attention as I read from Psalm 11."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "In the Lord, I take refuge."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "How can you say to my soul, flee like a bird to your mountain?"}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "For behold, the wicked bend the bow."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "They have fitted their arrow to the string, to shoot in the dark at the upright in heart."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "If the foundations are destroyed, what can the righteous do?"}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "The Lord is in his holy temple."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "The Lord's throne is in heaven."}]

[{"speaker_id": "1", "content": "Well, it is an absolute delight to welcome Alan Steele to preach."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "And for those of you who have not met Alan yet, Alan is not just our preacher, he's also my father-in-law."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "And so we look forward to hearing what the Lord has given him to share with us."}]

[{"speaker_id": "1", "content": "Well, over the next several months of the year, we are going to be working our way through the Book of Exodus."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "That's our new series we're launching into today."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "So naturally, I'd like for you to take your Bibles, please, and turn with me to the Gospel of Mark chapter one."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "Gospel of Mark chapter one."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "And Michael is here somewhere, there you are."}]

attributes.itunesTitle: God Is at Work, Even Here.
attributes.name: God Is at Work, Even Here.

attributes.snippet: [{"speaker_id": "1", "content": "Good morning."}, {"speaker_id": "2", "content": "I'm going to read Exodus 2, 11 through 25."}, {"speaker_id": "2", "content": "Moses flees to Midian."}, {"speaker_id": "2", "content": "One day when Moses had grown up, he went out to his people and looked on their burdens, and he saw an Egyptian beating a Hebrew, one of his people."}, {"speaker_id": "2", "content": "He looked this way and that, and seeing no one, he struck down the Egyptian and hid him in the sand."}]

[{"speaker_id": "1", "content": "All right, good morning, everybody."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "Brandon asked me to read our passage for this morning."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "So we'll get started."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "It's in your worship guide here."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "Exodus chapter 3, verses 1 through 14."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "Now Moses was keeping the flock of his father-in-law Jethro, the priest of Midian, and he led his flock to the west side of the wilderness and came to Horeb, the mountain of God."}]

attributes.itunesTitle: Delay, Disillusionment, and the Faithfulness of God
attributes.name: Delay, Disillusionment, and the Faithfulness of God

attributes.snippet: [{"speaker_id": "1", "content": "If you would please take your Bibles and turn with me to Exodus chapter four."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "Exodus chapter four."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "It's also there in your worship guides, our scripture reading."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "But just so you know, we are going to be covering a larger passage than what our reading will cover."}]

[{"speaker_id": "1", "content": "Well, when I was very young, my great-grandfather was still around."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "I only have one memory of my great-grandfather, but it's a good one."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "I remember going to his house and toddling to the back room where he was sitting in a comfortable chair, and he didn't have long left."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "He had an oxygen tank sat behind, or sat right beside him."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "He had tubes coming up into his nose."}]

[{"speaker_id": "1", "content": "We'll be in Exodus 12, 1-13, beginning in verse 1."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "The Lord said to Moses and Aaron in the land of Egypt, this month shall be for you the beginning of months, it shall be the first month of the year for you."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "Tell all the congregation of Israel that on the tenth day of this month, every man shall take a lamb according to their father's houses, a lamb for a household."}]

[{"speaker_id": "1", "content": "What do we do then when we feel trapped in our faith, starts to give way to fear?"}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "What do we do in that situation?"}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "Well, we can read about what the Israelites did, verses 10 to 12 in chapter 14."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "They cry out in fear to God."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "They look over at Moses, and they start to lash out at him and to blame him."}]

[{"speaker_id": "1", "content": "Yeah, seamless, seamless transition."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "I get to follow that, that's fantastic."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "Well, thank you so much for having me."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "It really is a pleasure and an honor to be here with you all this morning, to open up God's word together."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "I'm so thankful for this church family."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "I come from Redeemer Community Church, just down the road, down the hill, about 10, 15 minutes."}]

[{"speaker_id": "1", "content": "And it was good to be, I love being here, but it was good to be away last week too."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "It's good to be back again."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "I was actually at a concert last weekend, and if you'll let me, I'll talk your ear off about it."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "It was great."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "But I bought the tickets to this concert a little while back, and it was for the 25th anniversary of the soundtrack to A Brother Where Art Thou."}]

[{"speaker_id": "1", "content": "Good morning, Exodus 17, 1-7."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "All the congregation of the people of Israel moved on from the wilderness of sin by stages, according to the commandment of the Lord, and camped at Rephidim, that there was no water for the people to drink."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "Therefore, the people quarreled with Moses and said, Give us water to drink."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "And Moses said to them, Why do you quarrel with me?"}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "Why do you test the Lord?"}]

[{"speaker_id": "1", "content": "Our scripture reading for this morning comes from Exodus chapter 17, starting in verse eight."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "Then Amalek came and fought with Israel at Rephidim."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "So Moses said to Joshua, choose for us men and go out and fight with Amalek."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "Tomorrow, I will stand at the top of the hill with the staff of God in my hand."}]

[{"speaker_id": "1", "content": "Our scripture reading this morning is Luke 24, 13-35."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "It is printed in your worship guide if you would like to read along."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "Let's listen carefully for this is the word of God."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "That very day, two of them were going to a village named Emmaus, about seven miles from Jerusalem, and they were talking with each other about all these things that had happened."}]

[{"speaker_id": "1", "content": "Well, only a little while ago, we were in Exodus 3, where God appeared to Moses in a burning bush at Mount Horeb."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "And now he is going to return to this same place with the people of Israel."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "And so I'd like for us to turn to Exodus 19 to see this together this morning."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "So if you have a Bible, please take it and turn with me to Exodus 19."}]

[{"speaker_id": "1", "content": "Well, if you've got a Bible with you, I'd invite you to turn with me to Exodus chapter 24."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "Exodus 24, we've been walking through that book together."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "And as we come to this chapter, we'll see that worship is a major theme in it."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "In verse 2, we find God issuing a call to worship."}]

[{"speaker_id": "1", "content": "So, in Exodus 32, we'll start in verse 1."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "When the people saw that Moses delayed to come down from the mountain, the people gathered themselves together to Aaron and said to him, Up, make us gods, who shall go before us."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "As for this Moses, the man who brought us up out of the land of Egypt, we do not know what has become of him."}]

[{"speaker_id": "1", "content": "Well, if you would, please turn with me to the book of Exodus."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "We've been going through this book as a church family, and we are nearing the end of our series."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "And we're going to be looking today in Exodus 33 and 34."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "Exodus 33 and 34."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "It's also there in your worship guide, if you'd like to look there, if you've not got a Bible with you."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "We'll begin reading in verse 18 with Moses' request here."}]

[{"speaker_id": "1", "content": "Children, too."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "So if you've got a Bible, please turn with me to Exodus."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "Exodus 34, we'll have one finger there."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "And then if you could also turn to 2 Corinthians 3 and have another finger there, we'll kind of give equal time and weight to both of those this morning as we start nearing the end of our series in Exodus."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "You can also look at your worship guide."}]

[{"speaker_id": "1", "content": "Lord, on behalf of Trinity Fellowship, I was going to say thank you so much for your generosity and hospitality to us both today, and also your coming offer us to begin using your building here in Humboldt, so we really do appreciate it."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "We deeply appreciate you and our thrilled to partner with you in the sacred gospel here in Oldendale and beyond."}]

description.standard:
Scripture Reading: Numbers 13:17-31; 14:19-25 (read by Tom)

The Twelve Spies

Brandon Nelson continues our series through Numbers with a look at the moment Israel stood on the edge of the Promised Land.

attributes.fullDescription: Scripture Reading: Numbers 13:17-31; 14:19-25 (read by Tom) The Twelve Spies Brandon Nelson continues our series through Numbers with a look at the moment Israel stood on the edge of the Promised Land.
attributes.name: The Twelve Spies

attributes.snippet: [{"speaker_id": "1", "content": "And set out for the wilderness by the way to the Red Sea."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "This is the word of the Lord."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "May the Lord open our eyes to see wondrous things in His Word."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "Well, we're going to be looking at Numbers 13 and 14."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "And so if you've got your Bibles open there, we're going to be kind of doing a bird's-eye overview of what we see here."}]

[{"speaker_id": "1", "content": "We've read and done in our midst this morning."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "And Lord, I pray that you would be at work, that our eyes will be upon you."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "In Jesus' name, amen."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "Let's sing together."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "And then we can have a seat."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "Go ahead and go out to their classes as we come to God's Word together."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "We're gonna be reading Psalm 15 here in just a moment."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "So this summer, we're returning to the Book of Psalms."}]

[{"speaker_id": "1", "content": "Let's hear with us."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "If you would, turn in your Bibles to Psalm 16."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "That's our text for this morning."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "And I will go ahead and read it."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "Psalm 16, preserve me, O God, for in you I take refuge."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "I say to the Lord, you are my Lord, I have no good apart from you."}, {"speaker_id": "1", "content": "As for the saints in the land, they are the excellent ones, in whom is all my delight."}]
